title: ProfileEditor class — core API surface
body: Tracks the ProfileEditor class in src/profile.js — the primary public API for reading, mutating, and saving extracted profile directories. Covers method completeness, error handling, and TypeScript type stubs.

title: hotkey-builder — multi-action chord support
body: Tracks the hotkey builder module responsible for constructing multi-action chord shortcuts (e.g. Ctrl+K Ctrl+C). Covers the chord sequencing logic, modifier mapping, and integration with ProfileEditor.addHotkeyButton.

title: extract/pack pipeline — adm-zip wrapper
body: Tracks src/extract.js and src/pack.js — the adm-zipâ€“based ZIP read/write pipeline that converts .streamDeckProfile files to editable directories and back. Covers edge cases, large profiles, and error propagation.

title: validate — schema + invariant checks
body: Tracks src/validate.js — the structural validator that checks manifests, image references, grid bounds, and profile version invariants. Drives the quality gate and CI pipeline.

title: list — grid-layout printer
body: Tracks the list command in src/index.js and the list_profile MCP tool — the human-readable grid printer that renders page/row/button layouts to the console. Covers formatting edge cases and wide device support.

title: constants.js — KEY_CODES completeness audit
body: Audit and expand the KEY_CODES map in src/constants.js to cover all keys recognized by the Stream Deck firmware, including media keys, numpad variants, and international layouts.

title: profiles/_template/ — bootstrap for new apps
body: Tracks the _template profile directory used by ProfileEditor.initFromTemplate() to seed new app profiles. Covers the template manifest, default page structure, and placeholder icons.

title: image generator — 144x144 retina icon pipeline
body: Tracks scripts/generate-icons.js — the SVG-to-144x144-PNG icon generation pipeline that produces color-coded retina icons from shortcut category definitions.

title: Live-format to normalized-format converter
body: Tracks the bidirectional format converter that translates between the Stream Deck app's live on-disk format and the engine's normalized editable format. Both validate and list must accept both formats.

title: Plugin-format extension hooks — Pro tier API
body: Design and implement the plugin-format extension hook API that will underpin the Pro tier — allowing third-party skill authors and enterprise users to inject custom action types, validators, and icon renderers.

title: MCP tool: extract_profile
body: Tracks the extract_profile MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — exposes ZIP extraction to AI agents and Claude Desktop via the MCP stdio transport.

title: MCP tool: pack_profile
body: Tracks the pack_profile MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — exposes profile repacking to AI agents via the MCP protocol.

title: MCP tool: validate_profile
body: Tracks the validate_profile MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — exposes structural validation to AI agents so they can check profiles before packing.

title: MCP tool: list_profile
body: Tracks the list_profile MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — surfaces the button grid layout as structured text to AI agents for spatial reasoning about profile layouts.

title: MCP tool: add_shortcut
body: Tracks the add_shortcut MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — allows AI agents to programmatically add hotkey buttons to a profile page at a specific grid position with label, key, and modifier configuration.

title: MCP tool: generate_icons
body: Tracks the generate_icons MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — delegates to scripts/generate-icons.js to produce color-coded SVG/PNG icons for a shortcuts JSON file.

title: MCP tool: list_shortcuts
body: Tracks the list_shortcuts MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — reads and returns shortcut definitions from data/shortcuts/<app>.json for AI agent consumption.

title: MCP tool: quality_check
body: Tracks the quality_check MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — runs the quality gate script and returns an approve/reject verdict with a full check report including icon dimensions and button counts.

title: MCP tool: live_test_profile
body: Tracks the live_test_profile MCP tool in src/mcp-server.js — installs a profile into the Stream Deck app, restarts it, verifies the installation, and returns a PASS/FAIL report for CI integration.

title: MCP server npm publish pipeline
body: Set up the automated npm publish pipeline for the opendeck MCP server package — including version tagging, package.json exports configuration, and GitHub Actions release workflow.

title: MCP Pro tier — signed licenses + telemetry
body: Design and implement the MCP Pro tier gate — signed license validation, usage telemetry hooks, and feature flags that unlock advanced tools for paying subscribers.

title: MCP marketplace listing submissions
body: Prepare and submit the opendeck MCP server to the major MCP marketplace registries (Smithery, mcp.so, Glama) including README, capability manifest, and discovery metadata.

title: Skill: generate-profile
body: Tracks the generate-profile Claude Code skill in .claude/skills/generate-profile/SKILL.md — the end-to-end workflow skill for generating a .streamDeckProfile from an application's keyboard shortcuts.

title: Skill: capture-streamdeck-reference
body: Tracks the capture-streamdeck-reference skill — builds and validates a reference .streamDeckProfile containing all known built-in Stream Deck action types for reverse engineering new action formats.

title: Skill: drive-windows-gui
body: Tracks the drive-windows-gui skill — orchestrates the streamdeck-driver subagent to perform GUI operations in the Elgato Stream Deck app that cannot be done via JSON injection.

title: Skill: gh-project-manage
body: Tracks the gh-project-manage Claude Code skill — a GitHub project management skill for creating issues, updating project fields, and managing the opendeck-factory GitHub Project board.

title: Subagent: gh-project-manager
body: Tracks the gh-project-manager subagent definition (.claude/agents/gh-project-manager.md) — the autonomous agent responsible for project board health audits, field backfills, and bulk issue operations.

title: plugin.json manifest + schema validation
body: Tracks the .claude-plugin/plugin.json manifest — the Claude Code plugin descriptor that bundles the MCP server and skills. Includes JSON schema validation and spec compliance testing.

title: marketplace.json submission pipeline
body: Design and implement the marketplace.json submission artifact and automated pipeline for submitting the Claude Code plugin to the Anthropic marketplace — including metadata, screenshots, and capability declarations.

title: Plugin hooks: pre-pack, post-pack, pre-validate
body: Implement the pre-pack-validate, post-pack, and pre-validate lifecycle hooks in .claude-plugin/hooks/ — shell scripts invoked by the Claude Code harness to enforce quality gates around profile pack operations.

title: .mcp.json bundling rules
body: Define and document the .mcp.json configuration bundling rules for the Claude Code plugin — specifying how the MCP server entry point, environment, and permissions are declared for plugin distribution.

title: Plugin install-size budget < 5MB
body: Establish and enforce a < 5MB install-size budget for the Claude Code plugin bundle — includes dependency auditing, tree-shaking configuration, and a size-check CI step.

title: Plugin cross-platform smoke test Win/Mac/Linux
body: Add cross-platform smoke tests for the Claude Code plugin on Windows, macOS, and Linux — verifying the MCP server starts, tools respond, and hooks execute correctly on all three platforms.

title: Distribution: MCP server — Claude Desktop
body: Package and document the opendeck MCP server for Claude Desktop distribution — including the claude_desktop_config.json snippet, installation guide, and auto-update mechanism.

title: Distribution: Claude Code plugin marketplace submission
body: Submit the opendeck-factory plugin to the Claude Code plugin marketplace — covers marketplace.json preparation, review process, listing copy, and post-submission monitoring.

title: Distribution: VS Code extension pack
body: Create a VS Code extension that bundles the opendeck MCP server and provides a command palette UI for profile generation, validation, and Stream Deck management directly from VS Code.

title: Distribution: Obsidian plugin
body: Build an Obsidian plugin that integrates opendeck-factory — allowing users to manage Stream Deck profiles, browse shortcut catalogs, and trigger profile generation from within their Obsidian vault.

title: Distribution: CLI standalone binary
body: Package the opendeck-factory CLI as a standalone binary (via pkg or node-sea) for distribution without a Node.js requirement — covering Windows, macOS, and Linux x64/arm64 targets.

title: Catalog v1 release — VS Code pack 12 profiles
body: Ship the Catalog v1 milestone: 12 production-ready VS Code shortcut profiles (MK.2, XL, Mini variants) in the private catalog repo, bundled as a VS Code extension pack for the marketplace.

title: Catalog submission intake — Issue Form
body: Create a GitHub Issue Form template for community profile submissions to the catalog — capturing app name, platform, shortcut source, and license attestation.

title: Catalog-to-factory ingestion script
body: Write the ingestion script that pulls approved catalog entries from the private stream-deck-catalog repo and runs them through the factory pipeline to produce validated .streamDeckProfile artifacts.

title: Catalog billing/subscription harness
body: Implement the billing and subscription management harness for Catalog v2 — covering Stripe integration, license key issuance, and download gating for premium catalog profiles.

title: Script: gh-create-views.mjs — view automation
body: Tracks scripts/gh-create-views.mjs — the GitHub CLI automation script that creates and configures project board views (by area, priority, target, sprint) on the opendeck-factory GitHub Project.

title: Script: gh-project-sync.js — project field sync
body: Tracks scripts/gh-project-sync.js — the script that synchronizes GitHub issue metadata (labels, milestones) with GitHub Project custom field values to keep the board consistent.

title: Scripts: profile generation pipeline
body: Tracks the generative profile pipeline scripts (generate-from-shortcuts.js, fill-grid.js, expand-reference-profile.js, patch-missing-icons.js) that together transform shortcut JSON into complete .streamDeckProfile artifacts.

title: Script: gh-backfill-issues.mjs — bulk issue creator
body: Tracks scripts/gh-backfill-issues.mjs — the bulk issue creation script that reads component-inventory.json and creates all tracking issues with project field values on the GitHub Project board.

title: Script: gh-project-schema-migrate.mjs — field mutation runner
body: Tracks scripts/gh-project-schema-migrate.mjs — the script that applies GitHub Project field schema migrations (adding/renaming options, changing field types) via the GraphQL API.

title: Script: gh-linkage-backfill.mjs — retroactive milestone linkage
body: Tracks scripts/gh-linkage-backfill.mjs — the retroactive script that adds milestone and project field assignments to existing issues that were created before the project schema was finalized.

title: Commitlint + husky pre-commit hooks
body: Set up commitlint and husky pre-commit hooks to enforce conventional commit message format and run lint/validate checks before every commit to the opendeck-factory repo.

title: CHANGELOG automation — git-cliff
body: Configure git-cliff to auto-generate CHANGELOG.md from conventional commits on every release — covering scopes, breaking changes, and the FSL license frontmatter timestamp requirement.

title: prepare npm hook — install-hooks
body: Add a prepare npm lifecycle hook that installs git hooks via scripts/hooks/install-hooks so that any contributor who runs npm install automatically gets the commitlint and pre-commit hooks.

title: Docs: Obsidian vault — docs/obsidian-vault/
body: Maintain and expand the technical documentation Obsidian vault at docs/obsidian-vault/ — covering file format internals, API reference, patterns, and the graphify knowledge graph integration.

title: Docs: knowledge/github/ brain refresh cadence
body: Establish a periodic refresh cadence for the knowledge/github/ brain (75 fetched docs + 6 playbooks) — automating stale-doc detection and triggering graphify rebuilds when GitHub CLI docs change.

title: Docs: README public-facing overhaul
body: Overhaul the public README.md — add a hero section, quickstart, feature matrix, MCP server setup instructions, plugin installation guide, and license summary for open-source visitors.

title: Docs: CHANGELOG content curation
body: Curate and back-fill the CHANGELOG.md with accurate entries for v2.0.0 through v2.2.0 — ensuring the git-cliff automation has a clean baseline to build from for future releases.

title: Docs: API reference auto-generation
body: Set up JSDoc or TypeDoc to auto-generate an HTML/Markdown API reference from the src/ codebase — covering ProfileEditor, extract, pack, validate, and all exported utilities.

title: Licensing: FSL-1.1-ALv2 annual review
body: Conduct the annual FSL-1.1-ALv2 license review — verify SPDX identifiers in all source files, update NOTICE, and confirm the 2-year Apache 2.0 conversion schedule for each release.

title: Licensing: Trademark registration — OPENDECK wordmark USPTO
body: File a USPTO trademark application for the OPENDECK wordmark in IC 009 (software) and IC 042 (SaaS) — covering the brand protection required for the v3.0.0 commercial launch.

title: Licensing: NOTICE file upkeep
body: Keep the NOTICE file current with all third-party dependency attributions — triggered on any dependency addition or update, and validated as part of the CI lint pipeline.

title: Licensing: 2-year OSS conversion automation — Apache 2.0
body: Implement the automated Apache 2.0 conversion workflow triggered two years after each FSL release — including the GitHub Action, release notes update, and SPDX header swap.

title: GitHub Actions: project-sync workflow
body: Create the .github/workflows/project-sync.yml GitHub Actions workflow that runs gh-project-sync.js on every issue/PR event to keep GitHub Project custom fields in sync with issue labels and milestones.

title: GitHub Actions: status-update cron
body: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions cron workflow that runs nightly to audit project board health — flagging stale In-Progress items, unassigned P0s, and issues missing required field values.

title: GitHub App: opendeck-project-sync
body: Create and configure the opendeck-project-sync GitHub App — providing the OAuth credentials and project write permissions needed by the project-sync GitHub Actions workflow.

title: Branch protection rules — main branch
body: Configure branch protection rules on main — requiring PR reviews, passing CI status checks, and blocking direct pushes to protect the production release branch.

title: PR template — .github/pull_request_template.md
body: Create the .github/pull_request_template.md file with a standardized checklist covering test coverage, validation pass, CHANGELOG entry, and license header for all pull requests.

title: CODEOWNERS file
body: Add a .github/CODEOWNERS file mapping code areas (src/, scripts/, .claude-plugin/, docs/) to appropriate owners to enforce required reviewers on pull requests.

title: CI lint + validate pipeline
body: Set up the primary CI pipeline (.github/workflows/ci.yml) — running ESLint, running validate on all committed profiles, and checking NOTICE file completeness on every push and pull request.

title: graphify rebuild automation
body: Automate the graphify knowledge graph rebuild — triggering graphify update . after significant code changes via a post-commit hook or GitHub Actions workflow to keep graphify-out/ current.

title: Dependabot config
body: Add .github/dependabot.yml configuration to keep npm dependencies up to date with weekly automated PRs, scoped to the security and direct dependency levels.

title: release-please config
body: Configure release-please for automated changelog-driven GitHub releases — generating release PRs from conventional commits, bumping package.json version, and triggering the npm publish workflow.

title: npm publish credentials rotation
body: Document and automate the npm publish token rotation process — including GitHub secret updates, token expiry monitoring, and the runbook for emergency re-issuance.

title: Issue Form templates
body: Create GitHub Issue Form YAML templates (.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) for bug reports, feature requests, and catalog submissions — replacing freeform issue creation with structured intake forms.

title: Script: quality-gate.js — profile quality enforcement
body: Tracks scripts/quality-gate.js — the quality gate script that validates structure, counts buttons, checks 144x144 icon dimensions, and optionally checks packed file size, returning approve/reject with a full report.

title: Script: install-profile.js — live install pipeline
body: Tracks scripts/install-profile.js — the script that copies a .streamDeckProfile into the Stream Deck app's profile directory and writes an install-report.json for the live_test_profile MCP tool.

title: Script: verify-profile.js — post-install verification
body: Tracks scripts/verify-profile.js — the post-install verification script that confirms a profile UUID is present and correctly structured in the Stream Deck app's live profile directory.

title: Script: fix-typo.js — profile patch utility
body: Tracks scripts/fix-typo.js — the one-off profile patch utility for correcting label typos in extracted profile JSON without a full re-generation cycle.

title: Script: gh-project-setup.js — initial project bootstrap
body: Tracks scripts/gh-project-setup.js — the one-time setup script that bootstraps the GitHub Project board by creating all required custom fields, field options, and initial views.

title: Marketplace: Anthropic plugin store listing
body: Prepare and submit the opendeck-factory listing for the Anthropic Claude Code plugin marketplace — including plugin description, capability tags, hero image, and review submission.

title: Marketplace: VS Code Marketplace listing
body: Prepare and publish the opendeck VS Code extension to the Visual Studio Marketplace and Open VSX Registry — covering publisher account setup, extension manifest, and update automation.

title: Marketplace: Obsidian plugin community listing
body: Submit the opendeck Obsidian plugin to the Obsidian community plugins registry — covering the plugin manifest, README, and the Obsidian plugin review checklist.
